rationale: The citing paper explicitly tests several moderators and attenuation effects (Studies 6–8), which usually require probing interaction terms. The cited article is a core methodological guide on simple-effects testing in moderated regression (spotlight/floodlight and Johnson–Neyman), so it is plausibly being used as a method source rather than a perfunctory background citation. Given the direct DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
